channel.title: Planetary Physics on OkongOyangO's Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Planetary Physics on OkongOyangO's Notes

item.title: 😅Everyone's Doing Advanced Quantum Egyptology While I Just Want Earth to Blow Up?
item.author: yzj5306@psu.edu (OkongOyangO)
item.description: In a rotating reference frame, centrifugal force pushes objects away from the rotation axis. So can we build a toy model within basic physics to calculate how fast Earth needs to spin to destroy itself? This article constructs a simple model computable with physics competition knowledge—the Luoxi Limit.
